overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through Night City's bustling downtown district. The player navigates crowded pedestrian plazas with neon signage, crosses streets with futuristic vehicles, descends to a lower level featuring the Foodscape vendor area, and continues through increasingly narrow corridors between towering mega-buildings with heavy atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian shopping district with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through crowded pedestrian plaza, passing by various NPCs and neon storefronts

entered.detail: large green and yellow neon sign with 'MARKET' text mounted on building facade
tropical palm tree in large planter on pedestrian plaza
tall futuristic skyscrapers with reflective glass surfaces and multiple neon billboards
cluster of colorful digital advertising screens and neon signage on building faces

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bustling pedestrian plaza filled with NPCs walking in the same direction. A prominent green neon 'MARKET' sign is visible on the left, while palm trees and futuristic glass towers dominate the background. The atmosphere is bright and vibrant with mixed natural and neon lighting.

events.description: exits covered pedestrian walkway into open street intersection with visible sky
futuristic vehicle passes by on the right while approaching stair descent

agents.ego_description: navigating across the street intersection toward a stairway entrance, avoiding passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with support pillars spanning across the street
futuristic traffic signal pole with illuminated indicators
painted yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open intersection with full sky visibility and direct sunlight. The camera crosses the asphalt street toward a stairway entrance, passing under an elevated highway structure. A futuristic vehicle drives past on the right as the player approaches the descent to a lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level plaza with food vendors and transit tubes

events.description: descends concrete staircase to lower pedestrian level
enters shadowy lower plaza illuminated by green neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs into a lower plaza area, then proceeding toward a food vendor with neon signage

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading down to lower level
red neon sign with 'FOODSCAPE' text and Japanese characters below
transparent cylindrical elevated walkway with passengers visible inside
open concrete plaza area at lower elevation with scattered pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a concrete staircase into a sheltered lower plaza with limited sky visibility. The area is dimly lit with prominent red neon 'FOODSCAPE' signage on the right and a glass-enclosed transit tube running overhead. Steam vents and green neon lighting create a moody atmosphere in this sub-street level concourse.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with retro diner and corporate buildings

events.description: ascends stairs back to street level
crosses street while futuristic vehicles wait at intersection

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs from lower level then crossing the street near a prominent diner sign, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: large circular retro-style neon sign with 'Tom's Diner' text and starburst design
massive corporate building with 'KIROSHI' signage and blue neon accent lighting
large digital billboard displaying animated advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The player ascends back to street level into a sunlit intersection featuring the iconic 'Tom's Diner' neon sign. The camera crosses the asphalt crosswalk while vehicles wait nearby, with the Kiroshi corporate building becoming visible on the left. The area transitions from the shadowy lower level to a brighter street corner with moderate pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk between corporate buildings with overhead bridge

events.description: enters narrow corridor between high-rise buildings with reduced sky visibility

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow sidewalk passing the Kiroshi building, moving toward a darker corridor between skyscrapers

entered.detail: enclosed walkway bridge connecting two buildings overhead with glass panels
confined concrete walkway with metal railings separating from street traffic

segments.scene_description: The environment narrows into a confined sidewalk corridor between towering buildings. The Kiroshi corporate building dominates the left side at close proximity, while an overhead pedestrian bridge spans the corridor ahead. The lighting becomes more shadowed as the camera moves deeper into the urban canyon with sparse pedestrian presence.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street with heavy atmospheric haze and towering mega-structures

events.description: atmospheric haze and fog thicken significantly between the tall buildings
camera tilts upward to look up at the towering skyscrapers above

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow hazy street while looking up at the massive skyscrapers, observing the dense urban architecture

notable_agents.action: NPC walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing distinctive clothing

entered.detail: colossal residential and commercial towers with intricate architectural details and stacked construction
thick fog and atmospheric particles obscuring the upper portions of skyscrapers
floating holographic signs and 3D projected advertisements on building surfaces

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a deeply shadowed narrow street with heavy atmospheric haze obscuring the sky. The camera tilts upward to reveal massive mega-building structures towering overhead with industrial smoke stacks visible. Holographic advertisements float in the air as the player continues through this dense, canyon-like urban environment with sparse vehicle and pedestrian presence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant downtown district that descends into a moody subterranean concourse before returning to the bright city streets. It begins in a bustling pedestrian plaza characterized by green neon market signs and towering glass skyscrapers under a bright, mixed light. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a sunlit intersection where the player crosses an asphalt street beneath an elevated highway, passing a futuristic vehicle before approaching a stairway. The camera then descends these concrete stairs into a sheltered lower plaza, where the atmosphere shifts to a dim, moody environment filled with steam vents, red Foodscape signage, and an overhead glass transit tube. Finally, the view ascends back to street level, transitioning from the shadows into a bright intersection featuring the neon sign of Tom's Diner and the Kiroshi corporate building.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a tightening urban canyon that descends from a corporate corridor into a deeply shadowed industrial abyss. It begins on a confined sidewalk where the Kiroshi corporate building looms closely on the left, moving beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge as the lighting grows increasingly dim. As the camera pushes deeper into the urban canyon, the environment shifts into a narrow street where heavy atmospheric haze begins to obscure the sky. The scene then expands vertically as the camera tilts upward to reveal massive mega-building structures and industrial smoke stacks towering overhead. Finally, the movement continues through this dense, canyon-like environment, passing floating holographic advertisements amidst a sparse presence of vehicles and pedestrians.
